message:
ci: Remove registry-url to fix OIDC auth

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/wabbp1dfmryvowy27y4st07y

files.patch:
@@ -27,7 +27,6 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
           node-version: "22"
-          registry-url: "https://registry.npmjs.org"
 
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
